description: Ketubba on vellum, badly damaged. Location: Cairo ([...] ha-semukhah le-Fustat Miṣrayim in opening lines), and פה מצרים in the penultimate line. Dating: 13 Av 55[..] AM. The signature from Yeḥezqel Ḥefeṣ, a prolific early modern scribe, supports a dating estimate of 1770–1825 (his witnessed/scribed documents are c. 1776–1819). The bride's name is only legible as Buena, but her legal status as a "widow" is still visible. The groom's name is Avraham b. [...] Roṣano. The total ketubba valuation is 150 reales abū ṭāqa. ASE/MCD.
description_he: כתובה על קלף, פגומה קשות; מקום: קהיר; תיארוך: י'ג אב 55[..] = 1770-1825 לספירה; כלה: בואנה (אלמנה); חתן: אברהם בן [...] רוסנו; שווי כולל 150 ריאלים
